reviews.comment:
Es muy caro. 2200 un sanguche mas finito que mi celular no come ni uno de ahi. Tres fetas de matambre por 5500 pesos. Mas adelante en la ruta hay unos paradores buenísimo en los que por esa plata te dan hasta la bebida y el postre. Mejoren eso

(Translated by Google)
It's very expensive. 2200 pesos for a sandwich thinner than my cell phone. I can't eat one of those. Three slices of matambre for 5500 pesos. Further along the route, there are some great restaurants where you can even get a drink and dessert for that money. Improve that.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtODVxOHJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Correcta atención, baños muy limpios. Bello el predio. No le pongo 5 🌟 porque limpieza de parabrisas o control de cubiertas que siempre destacó al ACA, hoy es recuerdo de antaño. Deben ganar muy bien los playeros que no les importa ganar lo que obviamente los clientes retribuyen cuando se les brinda atención.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, very clean restrooms. Beautiful grounds. I'm not giving it 5 stars because windshield cleaning and tire checks, which used to be a hallmark of the ACA, are now just a distant memory. The attendants must be very well paid, since they don't seem to care about the effort, which customers obviously reciprocate when they receive good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkckxqUWpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mucho para opinar de la estación de servicio no hay. La atención es excelente, el playero que me atendió fue muy buena y si vuelvo a San Pedro volvería a cargar aquí.

(Translated by Google)
There's not much to say about the gas station. The service is excellent; the attendant who helped me was very nice, and if I return to San Pedro, I would definitely fill up here again.
